description_long: This is a rectangular table with a transparent or frosted glass top and sturdy wooden legs. The tabletop is thick and features a recessed rectangular section, giving it a modern, architectural look. The legs are made of solid wood, arranged in a geometric, angular fashion, providing both stability and a contemporary aesthetic. The glass surface is smooth and likely easy to clean, while the wooden legs add warmth and contrast to the design. There are no visible drawers, handles, or decorative embellishments, emphasizing a minimalist style. This table would be suitable for urban outdoor or indoor environments such as parks, patios, or modern communal spaces.
description: A modern rectangular table with a thick glass top and angular wooden legs, featuring a recessed central section and a minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the glass tabletop and the angular wooden legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the glass top and the depth of the recessed section.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually similar to the front, showing the glass top and wooden legs from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the tabletop thickness and the geometric leg structure.
